modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Questions about Panopto player functions and features.

full_description_text: User asked about Panopto player. They want to know what it can do. Not sure about the functions. Need more info on this.
